items.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
items.summary: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time.

items.title: EU approves €90bn loan for Ukraine as pipeline is turned on ending deadlock
items.summary: Ukraine says it has reopened the Druzhba pipeline, after months of stalemate over stalled oil supplies to neighbouring Hungary.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back

items.title: 控ChatGPT助釀校園槍擊案 佛州總檢察長對OpenAI展開刑事調查
